analysis_framework.description: SMC + Fibonacci + Order Flow. Indicators are confirmation only.
hierarchy: 1. Market Structure (SMC) — BOS, CHoCH, swing points
2. Key Levels — Order Blocks, FVGs, Liquidity, Fibonacci OTE
4. Order Flow — DOM absorption, imbalances, T&S aggression
5. Indicators — VWAP, EMA, RSI, MACD as confirmation

market_structure.uptrend: HH + HL, BOS to upside confirms
market_structure.downtrend: LH + LL, BOS to downside confirms
market_structure.choch: First HH in downtrend or first LL in uptrend = potential reversal

order_blocks.bullish: Last bearish candle before bullish displacement
order_blocks.bearish: Last bullish candle before bearish displacement
order_blocks.entry: Wait for retest with rejection candle

fair_value_gaps.trading: Use as entry zones with OB confluence

liquidity.sweep: Take stops then reverse — high probability reversal

rules: LONG: below Order Block or swing low + 2 pts buffer
SHORT: above Order Block or swing high + 2 pts buffer
OTE entry: stop below 0.886 or swing extreme
Liquidity sweep: stop below/above the sweep wick
Min 6 pts, Max 30 pts. If structure requires more, skip.

take_profit.tp1: First opposing OB/FVG or Fib -0.272 — close 1 contract
take_profit.tp2: Trail remaining 1 contract by swing structure

breakeven.trigger: Price reaches TP1 area (1.5R in profit)

rules: Never move stop further from price
On new HH (LONG): move stop to new HL
On new LL (SHORT): move stop to new LH

partial_exits.tp1: Close 1 of 2 contracts when first target hit

exit_triggers: Strong displacement against position with volume 2x average
DOM showing aggressive absorption against direction
VWAP cross against position with momentum

always_do: Log every decision with full reasoning
Check daily P&L via trade log before each new trade
Flatten everything by 15:55 ET via nt_exit_all
never_do: Trade during FOMC, CPI, NFP, PPI

circuit_breaker.action: nt_exit_all + stop trading for the day
